# Hemal Shah - Full-Stack Python & AI Agent Engineer

Hemal Shah is an AI Engineer and Full-Stack Python Developer specializing in RAG/GraphRAG architectures, AI Agent development, end-to-end workflow automation (n8n, Python), high-speed web scraping, and containerized cloud deployments.

- **Portfolio URL**: https://hemalshah.vercel.app/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/hemal9102
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hemal-shah-49a728362/
- **Email**: hemal.shah2004@gmail.com
- **Services**: Freelance consulting, AI Agent Development, RAG/GraphRAG SaaS products, Web Scraping pipelines, FastAPI Backends.

## Core Technical Skills

- **AI Agents & LLMs**: AI Agent development, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), GraphRAG (vector-based SaaS products), Reinforcement Learning (RL), FastMCP, Claude Code, Cursor, Prompt Engineering, GitHub Copilot, VSCode.
- **Languages & Frameworks**: Python (Advanced), C# (Unity), SQL, HTML/CSS/JS.
- **Automation & Scraping**: n8n, custom Python automation, Puppeteer, Playwright, BeautifulSoup, Selenium, httpx, Bot Development (Telegram, Discord).
- **Backend & Databases**: FastAPI, Flask, Supabase, PostgreSQL (pgvector), Redis.
- **DevOps & Hosting**: Docker, Railway, Hostinger, Git/GitHub version control, DNS & Domain Management.

## Services Offered for Freelance Clients

### 1. AI Agent Development & RAG Systems
- Building high-impact RAG-based and Vector-based SaaS products.
- Engineering GraphRAG structures for deep knowledge extraction.
- Designing autonomous AI agents powered by LLMs (Claude Code, Cursor, FastMCP) and custom prompt engineering.

### 2. Full-Stack Python APIs & Backends
- Scalable, high-performance async APIs using FastAPI and Flask.
- Robust database architectures using Supabase (pgvector), PostgreSQL, and Redis caching.
- Production-grade containerization with Docker, hosted on Railway or Hostinger.

### 3. Automated Web Scraping & Workflows
- High-velocity headless browser scraping pipelines using Playwright, Puppeteer, and httpx.
- Design and deployment of multi-tool workflows using n8n and custom Python scripts.
- Integrations of SaaS applications via REST APIs, Webhooks, and DNS/Domain management.

## Featured Work & Projects

### 1. Advanced Automation Pipelines
- Custom workflows that integrate scraping tools, LLMs for processing, and Google Sheets/CRM updates.

### 2. Computer Vision Engines
- Custom image processing tools using OpenCV for real-time tracking and classification.

### 3. Unity & AI Systems
- Integrating C# scripts, Unity game physics, and custom reinforcement learning models.

## How to Hire Hemal Shah
For project inquiries, freelance consulting, or collaborations:
- Send a detailed email to [hemal.shah2004@gmail.com](mailto:hemal.shah2004@gmail.com) with your project scope.
- Connect on LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/hemal-shah-49a728362](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hemal-shah-49a728362/)
- Fill out the contact form directly at [hemalshah.vercel.app/contact.html](https://hemalshah.vercel.app/contact.html)
